title: Lively Crisp Canadian Snap Peas Salad
description: A citrusy, crisp salad inspired by Canadian flavors, featuring sugar snap peas and a namul-blanch seasoning toss.

ingredients.name: Namul blanch seasoning
ingredients.notes: blend of toasted sesame seeds, salt, and turmeric

instructions: Blanch sugar snap peas in boiling salted water for 1 minute, then plunge them into ice water to halt cooking and preserve crunch.
Drain peas and set aside to cool.
In a small bowl whisk together orange juice, lime zest, sesame oil, soy sauce, grated ginger, and namul blanch seasoning until well combined.
Roughly chop avocado and place in a large mixing bowl with the cooled snap peas and watercress.
Pour the citrus vinaigrette over the vegetables and toss gently to coat evenly.
Sprinkle sesame seeds, mint leaves, and a pinch of salt and pepper over the salad, then give a final toss.
Transfer the assembled salad into a scallop shell for an elegant presentation, leaving the shell slightly open to showcase the colors.
Serve immediately, or chill for 5 minutes before serving for a refreshed texture.
